message:
refactor(abi): migrate scheduler functions to native syscalls

Adds 5 new syscall wrappers for scheduler operations:
- sys_sched_get_priority_max, sys_sched_get_priority_min
- sys_sched_rr_get_interval
- sys_sched_setaffinity, sys_sched_getaffinity

Migrates 9 libc::syscall calls to native wrappers (200 → 191).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
